details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. All other expected top-level directories present: src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/, reports/audit/.

reports/board/ directory missing (required governance contract path). memory_bank/ has 4 docs (report_output_contract.md, report_retention_policy.md, systemPatterns.md, TELEMETRY_CHANGELOG.md). .cursor/automations/ exists with README.md and specs.
